title: Lumière Beauty Brand
shortDescription: A complete digital identity redesign for a luxury French skincare brand.
description: We transformed Lumière's online presence with a sophisticated e-commerce platform and brand identity system. The project included a full UX audit, custom component library, and conversion-optimized checkout flow that increased sales by 34%.

testimonial.text: NXR Corporation exceeded every expectation. Our website now perfectly captures the luxury essence of our brand, and the results speak for themselves.
testimonial.author: Sophie Marceau

title: Verde Wellness Platform
shortDescription: Holistic wellness booking and content platform for a boutique studio.
description: Verde needed a seamless digital hub connecting yoga, nutrition, and meditation services. We built a fully integrated booking system with personalized dashboards, subscription management, and a content library — all beautifully wrapped in a serene, nature-inspired design.

testimonial.text: The platform NXR built has fundamentally changed how we operate. Client bookings increased 60% in the first month alone.
testimonial.author: Amara Osei

title: Atlas Architecture Portfolio
shortDescription: Award-winning portfolio site for a prestigious architecture firm.
description: Atlas Architecture required a digital canvas as refined as their buildings. We crafted an immersive, scroll-based storytelling experience with full-bleed project photography, smooth transitions, and a bespoke CMS that allows the team to publish new projects effortlessly.

testimonial.text: We have won three new major projects directly attributed to prospects discovering us through our new website. Exceptional work.
testimonial.author: Marcus Chen

title: Nova FinTech Dashboard
shortDescription: Real-time financial analytics dashboard for a growing fintech startup.
description: Nova's team needed a powerful yet intuitive dashboard to visualize complex financial data. We built a real-time analytics platform with interactive charts, customizable widgets, role-based access controls, and a clean design language that makes data genuinely enjoyable to explore.

testimonial.text: The dashboard NXR built saves our team hours every week. It's intuitive, fast, and our investors love it during presentations.
testimonial.author: David Park

title: Soleil Restaurant Website
shortDescription: Stunning online presence and reservation system for a fine dining restaurant.
description: Soleil Restaurant deserved a website as exquisite as their cuisine. We created an immersive dining experience online — complete with animated menu reveals, real-time OpenTable integration, private event inquiry forms, and a story-driven design that makes guests hungry before they even arrive.

testimonial.text: Reservations via our website went up 80% after launch. The NXR team truly understood our brand and translated it beautifully online.
testimonial.author: Isabelle Laurent

title: Bloom Event Planning
shortDescription: Premium event planning brand with interactive inquiry and gallery system.
description: Bloom Events needed a platform that could showcase their gorgeous events while converting visitors into clients. We delivered a stunning gallery-forward website with a smart inquiry wizard, vendor showcase, real testimonials, and an Instagram-integrated feed that keeps the site feeling fresh.

testimonial.text: Every bride who visits our site says it's the most beautiful event planning website they've seen. NXR knocked it out of the park.
testimonial.author: Naomi Williams
